sections.title: C: Original key word transformation practice
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Units 22, 23 and 24. **CAN'T**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Units 22, 23 and 24.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Units 22, 23 and 24. **AWAY**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Units 22, 23 and 24.

Sara began the exam workshop before the lesson on Units 22, 23 and 24. **FOR**
The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Units 22, 23 and 24.

Tom began the online lesson before the lesson on Units 22, 23 and 24. **ACCUSED**
The online lesson ...... before the lesson on Units 22, 23 and 24.
